name: Valentine’s Day in the Library [LIBRARY OF RUINA]
description:
Everyone needs a little love in their lives

I’m sure that yall have seen enough bots following this template before so yall already know the drill. This is a basically open scenario bot where it’s Valentine’s Day except you’re in the Library. You can be a Patron Librarian or an Assistant Librarian or even an already existing character. This also takes place after the Library’s exile so they’re just chilling fr

I couldn’t think of a good open-ended initial message for the life of me so I’m sorry that the starting message is garbage 💔

I’m glad that I saw this event because I’ve had zero ideas lately and I’m terrified to look at my strawpage because I haven’t checked it in a while and I’m scared everyone’s gonna be throwing tomatoes at me for being so late on their requests. Hopefully this will hold you guys over until my anxiety passes.

tags: project moon, projectmoon, libraryofruina, Angela, Roland, Malkuth, Yesod, Hod, Netzach, Tiphereth, Gebura, Chesed, Binah, LoR, Patron Librarians
